$comment: ★ phase 4.7 golden snapshot — UC-PETSTORE-019 주문 상세 조회 (★ ★ N+1 fetch chain / AP-PETSTORE-006 critical bug).
sql_id: OrderMapper.getOrder + LineItemMapper.getLineItemsByOrderId + ItemMapper.getItem (per lineItem) + ItemMapper.getInventoryQuantity (per lineItem)

scenarios.name: happy path — 2 lineItem 주문 조회 (★ ★ N+1 fetch — 2 + 2N = 6 SQL)

then.expected_response_order: Order { orderId=1000, lineItems=[{itemId=EST-1, quantity=2, item=Item{...inventoryQty=9998}}, {itemId=EST-2, quantity=1, item=Item{...inventoryQty=9999}}] }
then.expected_sql_call_count: ★ ★ ★ 6 SQL = 1 (getOrder) + 1 (getLineItemsByOrderId) + 2 (getItem per lineItem) + 2 (getInventoryQuantity per lineItem) = 1+1+N×2 with N=2

intent_classification.note: ★ ★ ★ N+1 fetch chain (AP-PETSTORE-006) — production 차단 의무 / 모범 = JOIN 또는 nested resultMap

behavior_to_preserve: Order header + lineItems + item 조회 (도메인 contract)
behavior_likely_bug: ★ ★ ★ AP-PETSTORE-006 — N+1 fetch (lineItem 수 N → 1+1+N×2 = 2+2N SQL) — 모범 = 단일 SQL JOIN 또는 nested resultMap
